title: Is it possible to create a filter which will show items that are older than 30 days?
excerpt:
I’ve found a discussion about it - Filter Request: “Is NOT in the last” - Feature requests - monday Community Forum 
How do you address this kind of request?

posts.author: orb (Or Biton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve found a discussion about it - Filter Request: “Is NOT in the last” - Feature requests - monday Community Forum

How do you address this kind of request?

posts.author: tomi (Tomas Miskov)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 → we need this! Should not be hard to implement

posts.author: bgreen (Betsy Green)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. This would help me a lot.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about adding a formula column that compares ‘today’ to the created date and returns the difference. Then using the filter off of that column?
